industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Thai Solar Energy Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Solar Energy Public Company Limited generates and distributes electricity from solar and biomass power plants to government and private sector in Thailand and Japan. The company also leases land. As of December 31, 2020, it had 23 solar PV farm projects, 14 solar rooftop projects, and 3 biomass powerplants, with a total production capacity of 299.94 MW; and 1 solar floating project under construction with a capacity of 8 MW. The company was formerly known as Siam Solar Energy Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Thai Solar Energy Public Company Limited in 2009. Thai Solar Energy Public Company Limited was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
